name: get_component_source_code
description:
Get the React/TypeScript source code implementation of `@heroui/react` (OSS) components.
Accepts an array of OSS component names and returns the source code for each.
Shows how components are built using React Aria Components — for learning and debugging.
IMPORTANT: This covers OSS components only. Pro component source code is not exposed.
Use get_component_docs for usage examples instead of copying source directly.

components.description: Array of OSS component names from list_components. Accepts kebab-case names plus common import/display forms. Pro components are not available.
